title: RBI Master Direction on Trade Receivables Discounting System (TReDS), 2026
description: <cite index="32-2">The RBI issued the final Master Direction on the Trade Receivables Discounting System (TReDS), 2026, comprehensively reviewing and consolidating existing instructions into a single framework to simplify the onboarding of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) on TReDS platforms and to broaden participation.</cite> <cite index="32-3">The directions fix a minimum net worth of ₹25 crore for TReDS platform operators, with existing authorised entities having until 31 March 2028 to meet this requirement.</cite>
